name: MoxiWorks Real Estate Agent Productivity Platform API
what_it_does: MoxiWorks real estate agent productivity platform REST API for real estate brokerages, MLS organizations, and proptech developers to access agent CRM data, listing presentations, market reports, and transaction management — enabling automated agent workflow management, listing data integration, client relationship automation, and brokerage analytics through MoxiWorks' open platform used by 800+ brokerages and 400,000+ real estate agents. Enables AI agents to manage agent contact for CRM automation, handle listing presentation for automated market analysis automation, access transaction pipeline for deal management automation, retrieve moxi engage for email marketing automation, manage open house for event management automation, handle client activity for buyer/seller interaction tracking automation, access MLS data for property listing integration automation, retrieve agent performance for brokerage analytics automation, manage task automation for agent workflow automation, and integrate MoxiWorks with MLS, title, mortgage, and brokerage back office for end-to-end real estate agent automation.
use_cases: Accessing real estate agent CRM contacts and transaction pipeline for brokerage analytics automation agents
Automating listing presentation generation and market analysis for agent productivity automation agents
Integrating MoxiWorks with MLS data for automated listing activity and buyer match automation agents
Syncing agent transaction pipeline with title and escrow platforms for closing workflow automation agents
not_for: Consumer home search platforms (MoxiWorks is agent/brokerage tools, not consumer-facing)
Property data intelligence and investment analytics (CoStar/ATTOM are better for market data)
Transaction management only without agent CRM (Dotloop or Glide are standalone transaction tools)
best_when: A real estate brokerage, MLS, or proptech developer wanting AI agents to access agent CRM data, automate listing presentations, manage transaction pipelines, and integrate with MLS through MoxiWorks' agent productivity platform.
avoid_when: BROKERAGE OR TECHNOLOGY PARTNER REQUIRED: MoxiWorks API requires approved brokerage or technology partner agreement; automated public API access assumption creates no access; automated must be a MoxiWorks-connected brokerage or registered technology partner. MLS DATA REQUIRES MLS PARTICIPATION: MoxiWorks MLS data integration requires active MLS member brokerage status; automated public MLS data access through MoxiWorks assumption creates unauthorized access; automated brokerage must be active MLS participant. MOXI ID TRACKS AGENT IDENTITY: MoxiWorks uses unique MoxiID identifiers for agents; automated email-only agent identification assumption creates wrong agent match; automated must use MoxiID for agent entity identification. DATA SCOPE IS AGENT-CENTRIC: MoxiWorks data model is organized around individual agent activities; automated brokerage-wide aggregated view assumption creates agent-level data scattered across APIs; automated must aggregate across agent-level API calls for brokerage-wide analytics.

auth.notes: MoxiWorks uses API key (partner key + secret) for technology partner authentication. REST API with JSON. Seattle, WA HQ. Founded 2013 by York Baur and Victor Lund. Products: MoxiEngage (CRM), MoxiPresent (presentations), MoxiImpress (marketing), MoxiBalance (transactions), MoxiTalent (recruiting), MoxiInsights (market analytics). SDKs: None public. 800+ brokerages, 400,000+ agents. MLS integration. Competes with kvCORE and Brokermint for brokerage agent platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved technology partners; production requires brokerage or tech partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Technology partner pricing per integration; brokerage pricing per agent seat
pricing.notes: Seattle WA. Tech partner agreement for API. 800+ brokerages. MLS integration. Agent productivity focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per partner key; CRM and listing APIs throttled per tech partner agreement

known_agent_gotchas: TECHNOLOGY PARTNER AGREEMENT REQUIRED: MoxiWorks API requires approved technology partner agreement; automated anonymous API access assumption creates no available endpoint; automated must register as MoxiWorks technology partner before API development

MOXI_ID IS REQUIRED AGENT IDENTIFIER: MoxiWorks uses unique MoxiID for all agent entity references; automated email-only agent identification assumption creates agent_not_found; automated must use MoxiID (not email or license number) for all agent API operations

BROKERAGE MUST BE MLS PARTICIPANT: MoxiWorks MLS data requires active MLS membership for the brokerage; automated public MLS data access assumption creates unauthorized access to MLS proprietary data; automated brokerage must be active MLS member

DATA IS AGENT-LEVEL SCOPED: MoxiWorks returns agent-centric data; automated brokerage-wide aggregate view assumption creates scattered agent-level API calls; automated must aggregate across multiple agent calls for brokerage analytics

WEBHOOK FOR CRM EVENTS: MoxiWorks webhooks fire on contact creation, update, and transaction events; automated polling-only assumption creates delayed CRM sync; automated should use webhooks for real-time agent activity synchronization
agent_readiness.security_notes: Real estate agent productivity. NAR, MLS rules, CCPA. API key. US. Agent CRM and transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real estate agent platform. NAR, MLS rules. API key. US. Agent CRM and real estate transaction data.
